ICD-10 codes; 1999 forward) 

COMMENT: For decedents 1999–2006 there are up to eight underlying conditions on the NDI record, and for 2007 
forward there are up to 20 underlying conditions (ENTITY_COND_1–ENTITY_COND_20). Researchers 
wishing to obtain this NDI segment of the MBSF must obtain an additional approval beyond the CMS 
DUA. There is another version of the underlying cause of death conditions that is edited and audited 
by the National Center for Health Statistics (NCHS; reference
